name: Aerial Mapping Camera Trigger Mission
description: You are a Remote Sensing Scientist configuring a UAV for a photogrammetric strip-mapping sortie. Using the operations brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/mapping_ops_brief.txt, set the vehicle parameter WPNAV_SPEED to 800 (8 m/s) and create a mapping mission. The mission must include at least 4 navigation waypoints at 120 m altitude, with camera triggering (DO_SET_CAM_TRIGG_DIST) set to 25 meters after the first waypoint and disabled (distance 0) before the final waypoint. Ensure the mission ends with an RTL command and save the final plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/mapping_camera_mission.plan.
